title: Awaab’s Law: Guidance for tenants in social housing
body: "A note on this guidance  This non-statutory guidance is being published in relation to the Hazards in Social Housing (Prescribed Requirements) (England) Regulations 2025 also known as Awaab’s Law. These regulations came into force on 27 October 2025.   Separate guidance on Awaab’s Law for social landlords is available.   We welcome any feedback on where further clarification or additional information would be helpful. Please send any feedback to socialhousingsafety@communities.gov.uk. "
